title: Oil closes above $100 for second day as market shrugs off U.S. measures to reduce prices during Iran war
summary_full: Traders are continuing to monitor developments in the Middle East. Overnight, Trump hinted that an end to the conflict was not imminent.
summary_public: Traders are continuing to monitor developments in the Middle East. Overnight, Trump hinted that an end to the conflict was not imminent.
